plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-365 RP12.P01.M02.S09-RP12.P01.M04.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-365 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP12.P01 model foundation slice: the M02 Type And Shape Definition tail (optional field registry, state transition map, validation helper, fixture model, serialization shape, public export, model unit/invalid-reference/ownership-drift tests, Hermes model summary, Claude model review prompt, closeout handoff), the full M03 Primary Implementation Slice model cycle (the twenty model rows plus documentation entry and index export check), and the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice head (package directory layout through ownership metadata) as three descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H12), Claude review packet (C12), and CP00-366 handoff, without opening billing, proforma, invoice, or write-down runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-365 (RP12 Billing And Invoicing, risk class B, 40 units RP12.P01.M02.S09-RP12.P01.M04.S06) is a clean descriptor-only model-foundation-slice pack and is supported by its implementation, tests, validator, contract, and manifest. Independently verified via Read/Grep/Glob only: (1) Coverage is exactly 40 units with deliverable distribution {implementation:23, ui:5, fixture:2, test:6, hermes_evidence:2, claude_review:2} and micro-title distribution {Type And Shape Definition:12, Primary Implementation Slice:22, Secondary Workflow Slice:6}, matching plan, baseline, manifest, contract, and code requirements (confirmed 40 unit IDs and 40 per-unit implemented_pending_review statuses in the manifest). (2) The billing source (registry.js, service.js, validators.js, index.js) consists of pure frozen-object descriptor generators with no fs/net/http/child_process/process.env/fetch imports, no real data, and no writes. (3) The contract billing-core-contract.json is internally consistent (current_pack=CP00-365, model_foundation_slice_descriptor, cp365_requirements, cp365_no_write_attestation, no_write_attestation, historical_pack_bindings ending at CP00-365), and validate-rp12-billing-core-contract.mjs performs deepEqual checks between the stored contract and the code-generated descriptors/requirements/attestations. (4) No-write/no-real-data boundaries are comprehensively attested; Hermes patterns are used only as deterministic descriptor packets (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false / no_hermes_runtime_receipt:true), never product runtime. (5) Authority boundary is preserved: claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true; the manifest mirrors claude_not_final_approver:true and enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation:true. (6) CP178+ review hardening holds: the readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1432-byte non-empty stdout, well-formed JSON), invalid_attempts_preserved is empty, the forbidden_review_evidence list is present, and only Read/Grep/Glob are authorized. (7) The pack does not over-claim: it is honestly labeled production_ready:false, status implemented_pending_review, runtime_ready:false; production_ready_candidate:true denotes descriptor coverage/slice verification only, not an enterprise-trust or production claim. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present, which is expected because they are produced after this read-only review in the hardened sequence. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. Closeout for both the pack and the standing goal remains correctly gated behind downstream human final approval, which this pack preserves rather than bypasses.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-365 billing core model foundation slice descriptor pack
